title: DupeMe!
description: Lets you use a command and/or a key-bind to give yourself the item in your hand!
body:
# DupeMe!

This silly mod allows you and your server's members to give themselves whatever they're holding in their main hand when they run /dupe! :3

If their inventory is full (no matter their gamemode), no items drop on the ground.


You can also use a keybind, which is **Equals (`=`)** by default on QWERTY keyboards.

The keybind works across servers and just sends the **/dupe** command, so you can also use the mod on servers which implement their own command.


## How to use!

### Server Side

- /dupe command works for all players, regardless if they have the mod.
- Players with the mod can use the keybind to send the command.

### Client Side
- /dupe & the keybind will **NOT** work, unless the server has their own dupe mod/plugin.
